reviews.review_description: This is not original at all they do not give you anything besides something to semi talk to but then it doesn't listen to any points you bring up it constantly just judges you off of nothing horrible AI? I don't know if it's just meant to be like a option game or a AI experience but absolutely horrible do not play this do not get it it's free and I still don't recommend it oh by the way if I see this message gone peta you kill animals so I don't think you should have the right to talk to anyone about this type of subject
It's not story driven per se, but the challenge comes from trying to outwit the ai and seeing if it really does have an answer for everything.
